description: 🚀 Founded in San Francisco with $1.2M seed round. Core mission: AI-driven analytics for enterprises.
📊 Launched 'Nexus Core' platform. First 600+ customers, recognized as top emerging vendor.
🌍 Opened EMEA HQ in Berlin & APAC in Singapore. Headcount reaches 200.
💰 Series B: $78M. Launched predictive AI engine. Clients: 1,800+ enterprises.
🏆 Winner 'Best Analytics Suite'. Expanded to LATAM, 4,200 customers worldwide.
🤝 Strategic acquisition of 'DataFusion'. Strengthened real-time analytics.
🌱 Carbon-neutral certified. Launched ESG analytics module, adopted by Fortune 500.
📈 ARR hits $340M. Ranked #22 Forbes Cloud 100. New offices in Toronto & Dubai.
🧠 'Cortex AI' generative assistant launched. Over 2,500 enterprises adopt.
✨ NYSE debut (ticker: NEXAI). 7,200+ clients, pioneering spatial intelligence.
